title: urostigma myxifolium
intro: Urostigma myxifolium, also known as the Chinese parasol plant, is a type of medicinal plant native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Urostigma myxifolium is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal capsules, to utilize its medicinal properties.
